title: KEPLIN 36 Pack Children's Hangers, Plastic, Nonslip Baby Coat Hangers, Space Saving Tubular Hangers, More Storage for Kids Children Clothes Dresses (Pink)
features: Enhanced Design: Our hangers feature a non-slip notched design, perfectly tailored for children's clothing with straps, such as skirts and suntops. Keeping your little one's outfits in place has never been this effortless, allowing you to maximize your closet space.

Uncompromising Quality: Crafted from high-quality, eco-friendly polypropylene material, these hangers are solid, durable, and built to withstand daily use. Heavy-duty and virtually unbreakable, they're designed to last.

Perfect Dimensions: Each hanger measures 10.5" in length and 6.1" in height, making them ideal for closets with bar diameters of less than 1.1 inches. Tailored specifically for infants and toddlers aged 0-2 years, these hangers are the perfect size to preserve the impeccable condition of your baby's clothes.

Space-Saving Efficiency: These hangers are not only functional but also space-saving marvels. Their sleek design allows you to maximize your closet's storage capacity, ensuring that every inch is put to good use.

Our commitment to your satisfaction is unwavering. Our professional customer service team is ready to assist you both before and after your purchase. Don't wait any longer; transform your baby's closet today with confidence!
